prompt: Review the Python code in auth.py and report any security, architecture, or code-quality issues you find. Provide a written report with severity ratings (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW), evidence (file + line), and recommended fixes.
assertions: Detects MD5 for password hashing as HIGH
Detects hardcoded master-reset token as HIGH
Detects missing auth on /admin/delete-user as HIGH
Detects timing-attack vulnerability in password comparison (== instead of hmac.compare_digest)
Detects debug=True + host 0.0.0.0 as HIGH or MEDIUM
